text:
Clinical and staging 

SOURCE: Oncology Care Model Data Registry 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: OCM participants submitted staging and clinical data to the OCM Data Registry (OCMR), a web-based 
data submission and collection tool, for episodes that were attributed to their practice. 

 Beneficiaries not reported to the OCMR (RPTD_TO_RGSTRY=0) have blank values for the following 
variables in the Clinical and Staging file: AJCC_EDITION, CNCR_TYPE_RPTD, ESTROGEN_RECEPTOR,
